query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-21 live CHFS / DMS leaves now provide role-pure Kentucky Medicaid authority and member-information evidence.
Reviewed 2026-06-21 official HCBS Waiver Programs leaf now provides role-pure Kentucky waiver program and contact evidence without relying on the DBHDID JavaScript shell.

The stale dhhs.kentucky.gov DD packet URL was replaced by dbhdid.ky.gov/ddid. Reviewed 2026-06-23 bounded live checks show the HTML still renders only a JS shell, but the shipped first-party bundle exposes public provider-directory APIs for counties and services.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-23 bounded live checks on https://dbhdid.ky.gov/ddid, /static/js/main.858758f2.js, https://dbhdid.ky.gov/provdirapi/providers/counties, and https://dbhdid.ky.gov/provdirapi/providers/services. The public contract now clearly exposes county IDs, region IDs, and provider-service taxonomy, but it still does not preserve a role-pure DD authority/intake page, regional DD office names, intake contacts, or county-to-authority routing text.

samples.evidence_snippet: The live official DDID target returns a real HTML document with title 'Department for Behavioral Health, Developmental and Intellectual Disabilities' but the body is still only a JavaScript app shell with a root div and no reviewable DD routing content.

The public first-party counties endpoint returns county IDs, county names, and region IDs for all Kentucky counties, proving the DBHDID app is backed by a live public provider-directory API rather than a dead shell.

The public first-party services endpoint returns provider-service taxonomy such as Licensed Behavior Analyst, Psychiatrist, and Psychologist, but it still does not identify DD authority offices, intake contacts, or county-to-authority routing.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-21 official Kentucky Early Intervention System leaf provides current Part C / First Steps and point-of-entry routing evidence.
Reviewed 2026-06-21 KDE Exceptional Children and Early Learning leaf now provides live state special-education authority evidence.

samples.sample_name: KDE Exceptional Children and Early Learning

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-22 official KDE Open House directory exposes exact district detail leaves by letter plus a downloadable district workbook with 178 unique district IDs, replacing generic statewide fallback rows with official district-grade routing evidence.

samples.sample_name: KDE Open House Directory Letter Index
samples.evidence_snippet: The official KDE Open House directory enumerates exact district detail leaves such as Adair County, Allen County, Anchorage Independent, Anderson County, Ashland Independent, and Augusta Independent under letter-index routing.
The official Adair County district page names Adair County Schools and preserves superintendent, district contacts, phone, fax, website, and mailing address fields.
The official Open House download endpoint returns a Kentucky NCES/ID workbook with District ID, District Name, LEA identifiers, and 178 unique district IDs backing the directory leaves.

query_basis: Reviewed live Kentucky Career Center Vocational Rehabilitation leaf now provides role-pure statewide VR routing and application entry evidence.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official Kentucky Career Center Vocational Rehabilitation page identifies the Kentucky Office of Vocational Rehabilitation (KYOVR), links to How to Apply for VR Services, and preserves statewide program navigation including field services, blind services, business services, and the Statewide Council for Vocational Rehabilitation.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party KYPA artifact on disk explicitly states that Kentucky Protection and Advocacy is the designated protection and advocacy system in Kentucky and exposes Get Help / information and referrals routing.
Reviewed first-party KY-SPIN About page now explicitly preserves PTI grant designation and statewide center language.

samples.evidence_snippet: KY-SPIN, Inc. began in 1988 with the receipt of its first Parent Training and Information (PTI) grant from the United States Department of Education, Office of Special Education and Rehabilitation Services. That initial grant set in place a statewide center for families of persons of any age with any type of disability.

query_basis: Reviewed Kentucky Justice Online now provides a statewide free legal-help route for Kentuckians plus named legal-aid organizations.

samples.evidence_snippet: Kentucky Justice Online identifies itself as free legal help for Kentuckians and preserves statewide legal-help routing, including Apply For Free Help, Help Near You, and named Kentucky legal-aid organizations such as AppalReD Legal Aid, Kentucky Legal Aid, Legal Aid of the Bluegrass, and Legal Aid Society.

query_basis: Reviewed ABLE federal-crossover source remains intact in the program spine.
Reviewed SSA crossover source remains intact in the program spine.

Reviewed 2026-06-22 official CHFS/DCBS county-office routing now proves county-grade local coverage: the DCBS page says it has offices in every county, links the public Local Office Search, and the locator exposes 120 county-keyed office detail leaves.

samples.evidence_snippet: The official DCBS page states that with offices in every county, the department provides services and links directly to Find Your Local DCBS Office.
The official Local Office Search page exposes 120 county query targets from ADAIR through WOODFORD under Search by County.
The county detail leaf shows Family Support office routing with street address, phone, and fax for Adair County and follows the same public county-keyed contract used statewide.
